articles.title: Here are four under the radar Red Sox players standing out in spring training
articles.description:
Boston’s starting lineup is starting to take shape, but roster opportunities are still up for grabs.

The post Here are four under the radar Red Sox players standing out in spring training appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Red Sox roster opportunities remain open as spring training progresses.
Four under-the-radar players are making notable impressions this March.
Emerging talents could influence Boston's starting lineup for the upcoming season.
